title: Hiring Software Engineer at Housing.com International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Hiring Software Engineer at Housing.com International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Housing.com International Enterprises. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Faridabad-based team.

About Housing.com International Enterprises:
Housing.com International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Housing.com International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
